name: recoil_state_save_load_transition_lifecycle
description: RecoilStateSaveLoadTransition lifecycle helpers construct the global save/load transition state, register and run at-exit destruction, destroy the active dialog with flags 1, restore the base state vtable, and implement the scalar deleting destructor wrapper.
known_limits: Binary-safe status depends on the dedicated recoil_state_save_load_transition_lifecycle VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x435c80 validates vtable installation, default save-dialog kind, dialog clear, and self return.
Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x435a30, 0x435a40, 0x435a50, and 0x435a60 validates StaticInit/RegisterAtExit/AtExitDestructor thunk behavior around g_RecoilStateSaveLoadTransition.

Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x435cc0 validates transition vtable restoration, active-dialog scalar deleting destructor dispatch with flags 1, m_dialog clear, and base vtable restoration; 0x435ca0 validates the scalar deleting destructor wrapper.

The native smoke verifies constructor defaults, active and null destructor paths, scalar deleting destructor return/delete behavior, StaticInit construction of the global state, AtExitDestructor cleanup, and StaticInitAndRegisterAtExit construction.
